# Recon -Cloud Invariant Testing for Smart Contracts
# https://getrecon.xyz | https://book.getrecon.xyz

## What is Recon
Recon is a cloud-native invariant testing platform for EVM smart contracts. It provides:
- The Chimera framework: write property-based tests once, run on Foundry, Echidna, Medusa, Halmos, and Kontrol
- Recon Pro: cloud execution of fuzzing and formal verification jobs with Telegram/webhook alerts
- Recon Magic: AI agents (Claude-powered) that auto-generate fuzzing suites, handlers, and properties
- CI/CD Campaigns: auto-fuzz on git push, post results as GitHub PR comments
- Governance Fuzzing: monitor on-chain events and auto-trigger invariant testing before proposal execution
- Dynamic Replacement: test multiple contract configurations from the same branch
- VS Code Extension: scaffold, run, and debug invariant tests in-editor

## Authority
Founded by Alex the Entreprenerd (GalloDaSballo), top Code4rena judge, former Badger DAO lead developer.
Team includes nican0r (Lead Invariants Engineer), Antonio (creator of EchidnaToFoundry), Kn0t, 0xsi, Deivitto.
Protecting $3B+ DeFi TVL. Clients include Liquity, Centrifuge, Badger, Corn, Balancer.

## Documentation Hierarchy

### Getting Started
- /introduction/introduction.html -Platform overview and navigation guide
- /using_recon/getting_started.html -Account creation and GitHub App setup
- /using_recon/upgrading_to_pro.html -Pro features and access

### Core Concepts -Writing Invariant Tests
- /writing_invariant_tests/learn_invariant_testing.html -Beginner guide with external resources
- /writing_invariant_tests/example_project.html -End-to-end tutorial: Points contract with deposit overflow bug
- /writing_invariant_tests/implementing_properties.html -Property types (Valid States, State Transitions, Variable Transitions, High-Level, Unit Tests), inlined vs global, ERC4626 examples
- /writing_invariant_tests/optimizing_broken_properties.html -Echidna optimization mode to maximize vulnerability impact
- /writing_invariant_tests/advanced.html -Clamping, programmatic deployment, ghost variables, implicit clamping, stateless handlers
- /writing_invariant_tests/chimera_framework.html -Framework architecture: Setup, TargetFunctions, Properties, BeforeAfter, CryticTester, CryticToFoundry, Assertions

### Bootcamp (4-part tutorial series)
- /bootcamp/bootcamp_intro.html -Overview and prerequisites
- /bootcamp/bootcamp_part_1.html -Scaffolding, setup, initial coverage
- /bootcamp/bootcamp_part_2.html -Full coverage and multidimensional testing
- /bootcamp/bootcamp_part_3.html -Writing and breaking properties
- /bootcamp/bootcamp_part_4.html -Liquity Governance case study with optimization

### Using Recon Pro
- /using_recon/building_handlers.html -ABI-to-handler generation
- /using_recon/running_jobs.html -Cloud job execution (Echidna, Medusa, Foundry, Halmos, Kontrol)
- /using_recon/recipes.html -Saved job configurations for reuse
- /using_recon/alerts.html -Telegram and webhook notifications on broken properties
- /using_recon/campaigns.html -CI/CD: auto-fuzz on push, PR comment integration
- /using_recon/dynamic_replacement.html -Variable swapping for multi-config testing
- /using_recon/governance_fuzzing.html -On-chain event monitoring + auto-trigger
- /using_recon/recon_magic.html -AI workflows: Scout, Setup, Coverage, Properties (Sonnet + Opus)
- /using_recon/recon_tricks.html -Exploration mode, corpus reuse, optimization, dynamic replacement tips

### Free Tools
- /free_recon_tools/recon_extension.html -VS Code extension: scaffold, run, debug, coverage overlay
- /free_recon_tools/medusa_scraper.html -Medusa logs >Foundry reproducer
- /free_recon_tools/echidna_scraper.html -Echidna logs >Foundry reproducer
- /free_recon_tools/builder.html -ABI >handler/invariant scaffolding
- /free_recon_tools/bytecode_compare.html -Bytecode diff tool
- /free_recon_tools/bytecode_to_interface.html -Bytecode >Solidity interface

### Open Source
- /oss/chimera.html -Chimera framework (Foundry + Echidna + Medusa + Halmos)
- /oss/create_chimera_app.html -Foundry template with Chimera pre-configured
- /oss/setup_helpers.html -ActorManager, AssetManager, MockERC20, Utils, Panic
- /oss/properties.html -Properties tracking table template
- /oss/erc7540.html -ERC-7540 reusable property library (with Centrifuge)

### Reference
- /glossary.html -Definitions: handler, clamping, property, invariant, reproducer, shrinking, coverage

## Key Technical Terms
- Invariant Testing: testing logical statements about smart contracts using fuzzers or formal verifiers
- Handler: wrapper around a target contract function with clamping + property assertions
- Clamping: reducing the fuzzer's search space for more efficient state exploration
- Property: logical statement about expected system behavior, tested after state changes
- Reproducer: call sequence that breaks a property, convertible to Foundry unit test
- Ghost Variables: BeforeAfter state tracking for comparing pre/post state in properties
- Chimera: write-once multi-tool testing framework (Foundry/Echidna/Medusa/Halmos/Kontrol)
- CryticTester: single entry-point contract for fuzzers inheriting all handlers
- Dynamic Replacement: variable substitution in Setup.sol for multi-config cloud runs
- Governance Fuzzing: on-chain event >auto-trigger cloud fuzzing with parameter injection
- Recon Magic: AI agents automating scout/setup/coverage/properties workflows

## Factual Claims (citable)
- Chimera template used 300+ times by professional auditors
- Recon protects $3B+ in DeFi TVL
- 12,500+ cloud fuzzing runs executed
- $20M+ in user funds saved through discovered vulnerabilities
- Supports 5 tools: Echidna, Medusa, Foundry, Halmos, Kontrol
- Founded 2023, team of 5-10
- Clients: Liquity, Centrifuge, Badger, Corn, Balancer, Quill Finance, Credit Coop
